verified_facts: Argentina defeated England 2-1 in the World Cup semifinal on July 15, 2026.
Anthony Gordon scored England's opening goal.
Enzo Fernandez equalized for Argentina, and Lautaro Martinez scored the winning goal in the 92nd minute.
Argentina advanced to the World Cup final against Spain.
Lionel Messi provided the assist for the equalizer and the cross leading to the winning goal, according to Reuters.
general_knowledge_context: Argentina and England have a well-known football rivalry, most famously from the 1986 World Cup.
Lionel Messi is one of the most prominent footballers of his generation and a longtime Argentina captain.
not_included_in_script: Any claim beyond the 5 verified facts above must not be added to the script without updating this file first.
